items.text:
Have you ever just clumsily dropped something?
You had an easy grip, everything is normal and fine,

you were just turning to put some powders
into a tincture --
the tray clatters to the floor.
Oh, it'll take hours to re-grind those powders.

How hard was it just to keep my fingers clasped?
Did they open due to some kind of internal sedition?

items.comment: Todo: Some more explanation here; *want* to make a mess why? To avoid an appointment, to not take the medicine I know I'm supposed to take?
items.text: Did some part of me want to make a mess?

Or, have you ever -- the candles flickering suggestively,
the warmth of the air just so --

items.comment: Todo: the sheen of her hairy, hairy legs
items.text:
Well you didn't have to use the word "donkey",
even if the sheen of the hair on her legs --
in a nice way I mean --
it was like dropping the reagents, just like that.
